message:
chore(beads): sync bead status updates from br flush

.beads/issues.jsonl reflects the latest `br sync --flush-only` export
across roughly 35 franken_networkx beads whose updated_at timestamps
refreshed during the current working session. No new bead IDs are
introduced — the diff is per-row metadata churn (ordering / timestamp
normalisation / minor field touches) of already-tracked issues, plus
the status transitions that paired with the bead-closing commits
elsewhere in this branch's history.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
